carrier_strike.name: Carrier Strike Group
carrier_strike.description: Deploy carrier strike group to the Gulf of Oman.

hint.high: Maximum projection — high cost, high risk

naval_patrol.name: Naval Patrol
naval_patrol.description: Routine destroyer patrols through strait shipping lanes.

active_intercept.name: Active Intercept
active_intercept.description: Authorize aggressive rules of engagement against hostile vessels.

hint.high: Full combat authorization — one step from war

missile_strike.name: Precision Strike
missile_strike.description: Cruise missile strikes on Iranian military targets.

regional_deterrence.name: Regional Deterrence
regional_deterrence.description: Counter Iranian proxy forces — Houthis, militias, Hezbollah.

back_channel.name: Back-Channel Talks
back_channel.description: Secret negotiations with Iranian moderates through Oman.

gulf_coalition.name: Gulf Coalition
gulf_coalition.description: Build international maritime coalition with allied navies.

hint.med: Joint patrols with UK, France, Japan

un_resolution.name: UN Resolution
un_resolution.description: Push for Security Council resolution condemning Iran. Mostly symbolic — political cover at best.

hint.low: Statement of concern — nobody reads it
hint.high: Chapter VII — dead on arrival, but you tried

summit_proposal.name: Summit Proposal
summit_proposal.description: Propose direct leader-to-leader talks to resolve the crisis.

humanitarian_corridor.name: Humanitarian Corridor
humanitarian_corridor.description: Establish protected aid passage for affected civilian populations.

targeted_sanctions.name: Targeted Sanctions
targeted_sanctions.description: Freeze assets and ban travel for IRGC leadership.

maximum_pressure.name: Maximum Pressure
maximum_pressure.description: Full economic blockade with secondary sanctions.

reserve_release.name: Strategic Reserve Release
reserve_release.description: Release oil from Strategic Petroleum Reserve to stabilize markets.

trade_incentives.name: Trade Incentives
trade_incentives.description: Offer sanctions relief in exchange for de-escalation.

sigint_sweep.name: SIGINT Sweep
sigint_sweep.description: Signals intelligence collection across Iranian military comms.

cyber_operation.name: Cyber Operation
cyber_operation.description: Offensive and defensive cyber ops against Iranian networks.

hint.high: Full offensive — near act of war

drone_surveillance.name: Drone Surveillance
drone_surveillance.description: Deploy MQ-9 and RQ-4 UAVs over the strait.

hint.high: Saturated coverage — may get shot down

mine_countermeasures.name: Mine Countermeasures
mine_countermeasures.description: Deploy MCM vessels and underwater drones to clear mines from shipping lanes.

submarine_warfare.name: Submarine Warfare
submarine_warfare.description: Deploy Los Angeles-class attack submarines to shadow Iranian naval assets.

ballistic_missile_defense.name: Missile Defense
ballistic_missile_defense.description: Deploy THAAD and Patriot batteries to protect Gulf bases and allied territory.

war_crimes_tribunal.name: War Crimes Tribunal
war_crimes_tribunal.description: Push for international tribunal to document Iranian violations. Legal warfare.

oil_diplomacy.name: Oil Diplomacy
oil_diplomacy.description: Coordinate with OPEC+ and IEA to stabilize global oil markets.

insurance_backstop.name: Insurance Backstop
insurance_backstop.description: Government-backed maritime insurance to keep tankers transiting the strait.

humint_iran.name: HUMINT Iran
humint_iran.description: Deploy human intelligence assets inside Iran to understand leadership intentions.

electronic_warfare.name: Electronic Warfare
electronic_warfare.description: Deploy EA-18G Growlers and shipboard EW systems to jam Iranian communications.

media_blitz.name: Media Campaign
media_blitz.description: Coordinate messaging to control the narrative at home and abroad.

congressional_briefing.name: Congressional Briefing
congressional_briefing.description: Brief congressional leadership to maintain political support.

america_first.name: America First
america_first.description: Reduce overseas commitments. Focus on domestic energy.

art_of_deal.name: Art of the Deal
art_of_deal.description: Demand Gulf states pay for protection or lose it.

abraham_accords.name: Abraham Accords II
abraham_accords.description: Leverage Gulf relationships for regional peace framework.

shock_awe.name: Shock & Awe
shock_awe.description: Overwhelming military demonstration. Every asset, visible and loud.

osint_flood.name: OSINT Flood
osint_flood.description: Crowdsource intelligence using open-source analysis. Chat does the work.

populist_rally.name: America First Rally
populist_rally.description: Massive domestic rally. Frame crisis as us vs. the establishment.

saudi_deal.name: Saudi Grand Bargain
saudi_deal.description: MBS commits Saudi resources and influence to resolve the crisis.

uae_port_access.name: UAE Port Access
uae_port_access.description: MBZ grants full access to Fujairah port for US operations.

bosphorus_leverage.name: Turkish Leverage
bosphorus_leverage.description: Erdogan applies pressure on Iran through economic and military channels.

secret_channel.name: Araghchi Direct Line
secret_channel.description: Direct communication with Iranian moderates through Araghchi.

mossad_intel.name: Mossad Intelligence
mossad_intel.description: Netanyahu shares Mossad intelligence on Iranian operations.

smart_pressure.name: SMART PRESSURE
smart_pressure.description: Sanctions + Diplomacy: Sanctions effectiveness +25%, diplomatic overtures carry more weight.
smart_pressure.flavor: Iran knows the stick is real. The carrot becomes more appealing.

iron_curtain.name: IRON CURTAIN
iron_curtain.description: Naval Patrol + Carrier Group: Intercept chance +15%, combined naval presence creates impenetrable screen.
iron_curtain.flavor: Nothing gets through the strait without your permission.

hearts_and_minds.name: HEARTS AND MINDS
hearts_and_minds.description: Humanitarian Aid + Media Campaign: Standing +3/day, approval +2/day, significant budget drain.
hearts_and_minds.flavor: The world sees America at its best. Your accountants see the bill.

shadow_war.name: SHADOW WAR
shadow_war.description: Cyber Operations + Intelligence Surge: Intel generation doubled, fog reduction doubled. If discovered: massive credibility hit.
shadow_war.flavor: The invisible war. Devastating when it works. Career-ending when it doesn't.

fortress_america.name: FORTRESS AMERICA
fortress_america.description: Missile Defense + Troop Surge: Deterrence +10, tension -5 (defensive posture reads as non-provocative).
fortress_america.flavor: A wall of steel that says "we're not here to attack — we're here to stay."

diplomatic_blitz.name: DIPLOMATIC BLITZ
diplomatic_blitz.description: UN Engagement + Allied Coordination: DipCapital generation +50%, UN events succeed more often.
diplomatic_blitz.flavor: The diplomatic machine runs at full speed. But military flexibility suffers.

maximum_pressure.name: MAXIMUM PRESSURE
maximum_pressure.description: Sanctions + Carrier Group + Cyber Ops: Iran economy squeezed, faction balance shifts toward moderates. But tension rises.
maximum_pressure.flavor: Every lever pulled at once. Iran feels the pressure from all sides. International fatigue sets in after 10 days.
